name: Load Robot Cell From ROS
description: Load a RobotCell (URDF + SRDF, optionally with meshes) from a connected ROS bridge. Auto-detects ROS 1 vs ROS 2 transport. Tools and rigid bodies wired into `tools`/`rigid_bodies` are registered into the cell in one go, so no separate Add* + set_robot_cell() step is needed.

inputParameters.name: load_geometry
inputParameters.description: If True (default when unwired), fetch mesh geometry. Set to False for faster loads when only kinematics are needed.

inputParameters.name: urdf_param_name
inputParameters.description: ROS parameter / topic name for the URDF. Defaults to '/robot_description'.

inputParameters.name: srdf_param_name
inputParameters.description: ROS parameter / topic name for the SRDF. Defaults to '/robot_description_semantic'.

inputParameters.name: http_file_server_base_url
inputParameters.description: ROS 2 only: base URL of the HTTP file server hosting package:// meshes. Defaults to http://<rosbridge-host>:9190.

inputParameters.name: load
inputParameters.description: Trigger the (re)load. Defaults to False so the canvas does not refetch on every refresh.

inputParameters.name: tools
inputParameters.description: Optional list of ToolModels to register into the cell. Each is keyed by its `.name`. Re-applied on every refresh without refetching, so editing this does not need a reload.

inputParameters.name: rigid_bodies
inputParameters.description: Optional list of RigidBodies to register into the cell. Each is keyed by its `.name` (set it on the Rigid Body From… component).

outputParameters.name: robot_cell_state
outputParameters.description: Default RobotCellState matching the loaded cell.

outputParameters.name: detected_distro
outputParameters.description: ROS distribution detected by the client (e.g. 'noetic', 'jazzy'). Useful for diagnosing ROS 1 vs ROS 2 loader mismatches.
